_comment: Default-value reference for run_theoremB_rank_scaling.py (B4). Mirrors the B4Config dataclass defaults so they can be diffed. The script does NOT auto-load this JSON; to override defaults, pass CLI flags on the command line. See EXPERIMENT_PLAN_FINAL.MD §6.5 and the script's module docstring. B4 uses the same (eta, T) as B2/B3 so the full-rank matched asymptote reproduces B2 numerics. Spectral rank r is the primary control variable; the joint (r, L_S) sweep tests the theorem-B pure-spectral-shape law BEFORE hybridization.
